title: Implement Tag API methods (CRITICAL)
description:
Implement direct API methods for tag operations. Tags are CRITICAL - heavily used.

## Direct Client methods (Must-have)
- GetTaskTags(ctx, taskID int) (map[int]string, error) - getTaskTags
- SetTaskTags(ctx, projectID, taskID int, tags []string) error - setTaskTags

## Direct Client methods (Nice-to-have)
- GetAllTags(ctx) ([]Tag, error) - getAllTags
- GetTagsByProject(ctx, projectID int) ([]Tag, error) - getTagsByProject
- CreateTag(ctx, projectID int, name, colorID string) (int, error) - createTag
- UpdateTag(ctx, tagID int, name, colorID string) error - updateTag
- RemoveTag(ctx, tagID int) error - removeTag

## Files to create
- tags.go

## IMPORTANT NOTE
setTaskTags REPLACES ALL tags. Individual add/remove requires read-modify-write pattern (implemented in TaskScope).

## Acceptance criteria
- GetTaskTags returns map[tagID]tagName
- SetTaskTags accepts tag names (auto-creates if needed)

title: Implement Timestamp type with JSON handling
description:
Implement custom Timestamp type that handles Kanboard's Unix timestamp format.

## Requirements
- Timestamp struct wrapping time.Time
- UnmarshalJSON supporting:
  - Unix timestamps as integers
  - Empty strings and "0" as zero time
  - Zero value (0) as zero time
- MarshalJSON returning Unix timestamp or 0 for zero time

## Files to create
- timestamp.go

## Acceptance criteria
- Correctly parses integer Unix timestamps
- Handles empty strings and "0" strings
- Zero time marshals to 0
- Non-zero time marshals to Unix timestamp

title: Implement JSON-RPC client foundation
description:
Implement the core JSON-RPC 2.0 client for Kanboard API communication.

## Requirements
- JSONRPCRequest struct with jsonrpc, method, id, params fields
- JSONRPCResponse struct with jsonrpc, id, result, error fields  
- JSONRPCError struct with code and message
- Generic `call` method to send requests and parse responses
- Automatic `/jsonrpc.php` path appending to baseURL
- Thread-safe request ID generation via atomic.Int64

## Files to create
- jsonrpc.go

## Acceptance criteria
- All JSON-RPC structs properly marshal/unmarshal
- Request IDs increment atomically
- Supports subdirectory installations (e.g. /kanboard/jsonrpc.php)

```go

```

title: Implement authentication system
description:
Implement HTTP Basic Auth support for both API token and user/password authentication.

## Requirements
- Authenticator interface for auth strategies
- API Token auth: HTTP Basic with username `jsonrpc` and API token as password
- User/Password auth: HTTP Basic with username and password
- WithAPIToken(token string) fluent method
- WithBasicAuth(username, password string) fluent method
- Secure handling - no credential storage/logging

## Files to create
- auth.go

## Acceptance criteria
- Both auth methods work correctly
- Credentials properly encoded in Authorization header
- No sensitive data logged

title: Implement global task search with parallel execution
description:
Implement cross-project task search with parallel execution.

## Method to implement
- SearchTasksGlobally(ctx, query string) ([]Task, error)

## Workflow
1. Get all projects via getAllProjects
2. Execute searchTasks for each project in parallel (errgroup)
3. Aggregate and return all results
4. Respect context cancellation

## Implementation details
- Use golang.org/x/sync/errgroup for parallel execution
- Results channel to collect tasks
- Handle errors from any project search
- Context propagation for cancellation

## Files to modify
- tasks.go

## Acceptance criteria
- Parallel execution improves performance
- Context cancellation stops all goroutines
- Single project failure cancels remaining searches

title: Implement error types and handling
description:
Implement comprehensive error types for the Kanboard API client.

## Sentinel Errors
- ErrConnectionFailed, ErrTimeout (network)
- ErrUnauthorized, ErrForbidden (auth)
- ErrNotFound, ErrProjectNotFound, ErrTaskNotFound, ErrColumnNotFound, ErrCommentNotFound (resources)
- ErrAlreadyInLastColumn, ErrAlreadyInFirstColumn, ErrTaskClosed, ErrTaskOpen (logic)
- ErrEmptyTitle, ErrInvalidProjectID (validation)
- ErrAPIError (API)

## APIError struct
- Code int
- Message string
- Error() string method

## Helper functions
- IsNotFound(err error) bool
- IsUnauthorized(err error) bool
- IsAPIError(err error) bool

## Files to create
- errors.go

## Acceptance criteria
- All errors properly support errors.Is/errors.As
- Error wrapping with %w for context preservation

title: Implement MoveToNextColumn with column logic
description:
Implement TaskScope.MoveToNextColumn with automatic column position logic.

## Method to implement
- TaskScope.MoveToNextColumn(ctx) error

## Workflow
1. Get task via getTask
2. Get columns for task's project via getColumns
3. Sort columns by position
4. Find current column position
5. If last column: return ErrAlreadyInLastColumn
6. Move to next column via moveTaskPosition

## Files to modify
- task_scope.go

## Acceptance criteria
- Correctly identifies next column by position
- Returns ErrAlreadyInLastColumn for last column
- Handles column gaps (positions 1, 3, 5 etc.)

title: Implement TaskScope tag methods with read-modify-write (CRITICAL)
description:
Implement TaskScope tag methods with read-modify-write pattern. CRITICAL feature.

## TaskScope methods to implement
- GetTags(ctx) (map[int]string, error)
- SetTags(ctx, tags ...string) error - replaces ALL tags
- ClearTags(ctx) error - removes ALL tags
- AddTag(ctx, tag string) error - read-modify-write
- RemoveTag(ctx, tag string) error - read-modify-write
- HasTag(ctx, tag string) (bool, error)

## Read-Modify-Write Workflow for AddTag
1. Get task via getTask (need project_id)
2. Get current tags via getTaskTags
3. Check if tag already exists
4. If not: add tag to list
5. Call setTaskTags with updated list

## Read-Modify-Write Workflow for RemoveTag
1. Get task via getTask (need project_id)
2. Get current tags via getTaskTags
3. Filter out the tag to remove
4. Call setTaskTags with filtered list
5. If tag didn't exist: no error (idempotent)

## Files to modify
- task_scope.go

## IMPORTANT WARNING
This is NOT atomic. Concurrent tag modifications may cause data loss. Document this limitation.

## Acceptance criteria
- AddTag is idempotent (no error if tag exists)
- RemoveTag is idempotent (no error if tag doesn't exist)
- HasTag correctly checks tag existence
